title: Device Settings - All settings can be changed
scenario: All non-toggle settings in Device Settings can be changed and display correctly after value selection
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the phone and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. From the Home screen, tap the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. Tap any non-toggle option (e.g., Language, Sidetone, or similar picker-based setting).
4. Verify that a picker dialog displays listing all available values for that option.
5. Select any value from the picker.
6. Confirm that the picker closes and the selected option updates to show the new value on the Device Settings screen.
7. Repeat steps 3–6 for every non-toggle option available for that device.
8. After changing all options, verify that all updated values display correctly on the Device Settings screen.
expected: All non-toggle settings can be changed via a picker. The picker displays all available values, closes upon selection, and the Device Settings screen correctly reflects each new value.
